overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character exploring a post-apocalyptic natural environment. The character walks along a rocky shoreline, wades through a shallow misty river, and emerges onto a grassy bank with ancient mechanical ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverside with mossy cliffs and coniferous forest

events.description: character steps from rocky shore into shallow river water

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky shoreline beside the water, navigating around mossy boulders and fallen logs

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation lining the riverbank with green vegetation
twisted dead tree with bare branches atop a rocky outcrop
tall ancient metal structures visible through the mist in the distance
dense pine and fir trees covering the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky riverside path bordered by moss-covered cliffs on the left and the river on the right. A gnarled dead tree stands on a distant outcrop while ancient metal tower ruins are visible through the haze in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river with clear water and misty red rock formations

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow clear water, moving toward misty red rock formations downstream

entered.detail: clear shallow water with visible rocky riverbed and gentle current
large reddish-orange rock outcrop emerging from the mist ahead
dead tree trunks lying partially submerged along the river shore

segments.scene_description: The character wades through the shallow river, with clear water revealing the rocky bed below. Large red rock formations loom ahead through the mist while fallen logs line the left shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy riverside meadow with mechanical creature remains

events.description: character exits the river onto a grassy bank with tall vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass along the riverbank, passing a large dead mechanical creature

entered.detail: tall golden-brown grass covering the river shore with patches of dry vegetation
large fallen mechanical beast with exposed wires, metal plates, and glowing components

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the water onto a grassy bank, the character walks through tall golden grass past the remains of a large mechanical creature. The red rock formation now stands to the left while distant mountains are visible through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow rocky riverside path that gradually opens into a wide, grassy plain dominated by ancient ruins. It begins with the character walking between moss-covered cliffs and the river's edge, where a gnarled dead tree and distant metal towers are shrouded in haze. As the character descends into the shallow water, the perspective shifts to reveal a rocky riverbed and fallen logs, while massive red rock formations begin to loom through the mist ahead. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the river onto a bank of tall golden grass, passing the skeletal remains of a large mechanical creature. Finally, the camera moves past the red rocks toward a distant mountain range visible through the lingering atmospheric haze.
